mapper.sql: ra.re_id as rr_id, ra.type, ra.award_name, ra.award_star_time, ra.award_end_time, ra.award_company, ra.award_content, ra.award_result, ra.award_money, ra.reference_backup_flag, ra.remarks, ra.attribute1, ra.attribute2, ra.attribute3, ra.enabled_flag, ra.id, ra.update_time, ra.create_time, ra.update_by, ra.create_by

${tAlias}.re_id as ${tAlias}_rr_id, ${tAlias}.type as ${tAlias}_type, ${tAlias}.award_name as ${tAlias}_award_name, ${tAlias}.award_star_time as ${tAlias}_award_star_time, ${tAlias}.award_end_time as ${tAlias}_award_end_time, ${tAlias}.award_company as ${tAlias}_award_company, ${tAlias}.award_content as ${tAlias}_award_content, ${tAlias}.award_result as ${tAlias}_award_result, ${tAlias}.award_money as ${tAlias}_award_money, ${tAlias}.reference_backup_flag as ${tAlias}_reference_backup_flag, ${tAlias}.remarks as ${tAlias}_remarks, ${tAlias}.attribute1 as ${tAlias}_attribute1, ${tAlias}.attribute2 as ${tAlias}_attribute2, ${tAlias}.attribute3 as ${tAlias}_attribute3, ${tAlias}.enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_enabled_flag, ${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by
mapper.insert: insert into re_award (re_id, type, award_name, award_star_time, award_end_time, award_company, award_content, award_result, award_money, reference_backup_flag, remarks, attribute1, attribute2, attribute3, enabled_flag, update_time, create_time, update_by, create_by) values (#{recruitment.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{awardName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{awardStarTime,jdbcType=DATE}, #{awardEndTime,jdbcType=DATE}, #{awardCompany,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{awardContent,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{awardResult,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{awardMoney,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{referenceBackupFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{remarks,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT})
mapper.update: update re_award set re_id = #{recruitment.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, type = #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, award_name = #{awardName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, award_star_time = #{awardStarTime,jdbcType=DATE}, award_end_time = #{awardEndTime,jdbcType=DATE}, award_company = #{awardCompany,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, award_content = #{awardContent,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, award_result = #{awardResult,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, award_money = #{awardMoney,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, reference_backup_flag = #{referenceBackupFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, remarks = #{remarks,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute1 = #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute2 = #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute3 = #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, enabled_flag = #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
